ad_texts: just checking
You already optimize for Google. Now optimize for AI. Fuel your visibility across traditional and AI search with Semrush One.

Winter slump?
Time for a dose of vitamin S.
SEO and AI search visibility in one place. No extra tools, no extra tabs.
Search changed. Your decision process doesn't have to.

Your next customer might not discover your brand through search. An AI agent may do the research first.

The question is:
Will your brand be part of the recommendation in the agentic search era?

Here’s what marketers need to optimize for to make that happen 👇

This post is invisible. 
Your brand shouldn’t be.

Get a clear view of how your brand shows up across AI search at our Semrush Villa in Cannes Lions from June 22-25.

Secure your spot at the link in bio.

#SemrushVilla  #Cannes2026
Track and optimize your visibility across Google and AI search in one unified solution.

ad_texts: Vibe check: 30 open tabs. 20+ tools. One burned-out marketer. There has to be a better way, right?
See where your competitors get traffic, their top keywords, and the strategies driving their growth
SEO taking too much of your day? The Semrush SEO toolkit helps you grow your traffic like you’ve tripled your team.
When everything’s due yesterday, the Semrush SEO toolkit helps you move fast and rise to the top.
How to trigger a social media manager 101 👀

Reddit’s citations in ChatGPT dropped from 10% to 2% in days. That’s how fast AI platforms can rewrite visibility.

One system change can decide which brands get seen.

The takeaway?
Visibility today isn’t predictable, it’s adaptable.

Winners in AI search don’t wait. They:
⚡ Track visibility across platforms
⚡ Adjust content fast
⚡ Diversify to stay seen

Control your AI visibility before it controls you.
Start with Semrush AI SEO Toolkit.
Better ads start with better intel. Semrush shows you what’s working for your competitors—so you can do it better.
